selections.name: Unavoidable (IRE)
selections.reason: Promising debut win in Ireland and solid return at Hawkesbury. Elite trainer Matthew Smith has this one primed to peak second-up.

selections.name: Canjustify
selections.reason: Lightly raced 3yo filly carrying a low weight. The Richard Litt and Jay Ford combination is dangerous here.

selections.name: Knight Of Rhodes
selections.reason: Will strip fitter third-up. Won his maiden on heavy ground, so the Soft 5 track holds no fears and he draws the inside rail.

selections.name: Delago Serg
selections.reason: Consistent type who led and faded last start but can feature if he dictates the pace early.

danger_horse.name: Canjustify
danger_horse.reason: Gets significant weight relief and has shown enough in provincial company to threaten the top pick.

selections.name: Into The Fire
selections.reason: Consistent gelding who set the pace last start and won at this track two back. Well weighted to strike despite the wide draw.

selections.name: Showtime Maggie
selections.reason: Won nicely at this track and distance last start, but carries a hefty 137lbs penalty today which makes her vulnerable.

selections.name: Shoreman
selections.reason: Tracked the speed well for a close second here last time. Wide draw is a slight concern but his form is sound.

selections.name: Vinari
selections.reason: Held ground well last start and gets a favorable draw to sit just off the pace.

danger_horse.name: Showtime Maggie
danger_horse.reason: Proven track specialist who can overcome the weight penalty if she gets a soft run in transit.

selections.name: Over The Limit
selections.reason: Has been knocking on the door with consecutive placings. Ready to break through in this field.

selections.name: Isn't She Autumn
selections.reason: Bjorn Baker trained debutant who won a recent Canterbury trial. Elite stable commands respect.

selections.name: Maysun
selections.reason: Peter Snowden trained 2yo filly with solid trial form. Gets the elite trainer bonus and Ashley Morgan rides.

selections.name: Ocean Empress
selections.reason: Returns from a break with four trials under her belt. Drawn well to get a soft run.

danger_horse.name: Isn't She Autumn
danger_horse.reason: Unexposed elite stable runner who could blow this field away on debut.

selections.name: Marchon
selections.reason: Annabel Neasham & Rob Archibald trained 3yo who drops back from a solid Warwick Farm run. Clear class edge here.

selections.name: Strike A Pose
selections.reason: Ciaron Maher runner who has been solid in provincial company. Ready to peak third-up.

selections.name: Heligan
selections.reason: Consistent placegetter who draws the inside rail. Will be right in the finish again.

selections.name: Wave Dancer
selections.reason: Another Ciaron Maher runner who boxed on steadily last start. Top three prospect.

danger_horse.name: Strike A Pose
danger_horse.reason: Stablemate to the top picks and has the raw ability to upset if the pace is hot.

selections.name: Viipuri
selections.reason: Peter Snowden trained gelding dropping in class after tackling tougher provincial races. Standout in a decimated field.

selections.name: Benamera
selections.reason: Won well at Newcastle two starts back. Forgive the last run at Hawkesbury; can bounce back here.

selections.name: Pink Lamborghini
selections.reason: Won at Moruya and has a great inside draw. Will be prominent early.

selections.name: Platinum Ridge
selections.reason: Needs to improve but can sneak into the exotics in this small field.

danger_horse.name: Benamera
danger_horse.reason: Has the class to win this if he replicates his Newcastle form.

selections.name: Gunfighter Road
selections.reason: Won well at Nowra two back and followed up with a solid 3rd at Moruya. Fitter and ready.

selections.name: Mean As
selections.reason: Ciaron Maher trained gelding who won at Mudgee. Has the upside to challenge despite the wide draw.

selections.name: Sir Sublime
selections.reason: Consistent type who draws well and will appreciate the Soft 5 conditions.

selections.name: It Is To Be
selections.reason: Has the inside draw and has been racing consistently in similar grade.

danger_horse.name: Mean As
danger_horse.reason: Progressive type from an elite stable who can overcome the barrier.

selections.name: Astunner
selections.reason: Chasing four wins in a row. Thriving at the moment and can overcome the wide draw with early speed.

selections.name: Burgundy Girl
selections.reason: Drops back from Listed company. Won two straight before that and draws perfectly.

selections.name: Oneforian
selections.reason: Won two in a row before a solid 3rd at Orange. Well weighted and draws to get a gun run.

selections.name: Deepwater Artist (NZ)
selections.reason: Consistent performer who won at Nowra recently. Can feature in the finish.

danger_horse.name: Burgundy Girl
danger_horse.reason: Massive class drop from the Canberra Cup makes her a lethal threat.

selections.name: Trooper
selections.reason: Broke through for a maiden win at this track last start. Confidence is high and can go on with it.

selections.name: Very Sirius
selections.reason: Won nicely on debut at Mudgee. Lightly raced with plenty of upside.

selections.name: Xspiritous
selections.reason: Won at Wagga last start and has a good record on soft tracks.

selections.name: Girls Weekend
selections.reason: Has been racing in tougher provincial company. Can improve sharply here.

danger_horse.name: Very Sirius
danger_horse.reason: Unexposed filly who could be anything after a smart debut win.
